# Weekly Project Report — Project Project Alpha

## Progress
- Alice: yesterday "Prepared deployment checklist", today "Need to finish production deployment".
- Bob: yesterday "Finished API docs", today "Available to help".
- Carol: yesterday "Prepared QA plan", today "Waiting for deployment to start QA".

## Blockers
- Alice: Waiting on IT access
- Carol: Blocked until deployment is done

## Risks
- CRITICAL risk: Waiting on IT access may delay delivery
- HIGH risk: Blocked until deployment is done may delay delivery

## Workload
- Alice: heavy
- Bob: light
- Carol: normal

## Decisions
- pm-user approved decision-6a8c38a0
- pm-user approved decision-4b532d94
- pm-user approved decision-0cb49beb

## Recommended Next Steps
- Confirm blocker owner ETA within 24h.
- Apply approved resource support changes as a managed PM action.
- Monitor heavy workloads at next check-in.
